race.description: The Brothers War Guineas Prelude (Bm66) Hcp
race.comment: PARTY BOSS (7) shoulders a fitness edge and a strong peak from a terrific effort in the Country Champs Qualifier here on Feb 28. Has been freshened with a month and is perfectly placed to play a major role. OLE DAZE (1) was a strong debut winner at Wangaratta on Feb 28 then came close to making two on the trot at Sandown-Lakeside. Peaking now and can find his way back into the winner's circle. SPREAD THE LOVE (8) is a progressive type that will be at his top now after being claimed late at Albury. Will take some catching again.MICHELANGELO (4) returns and is having his first run for a new yard. Was a winner when fresh last campaign at Wyong over 1350m. Rates highly and makes plenty of appeal. BLUE MONDAY (5) opened this prep a month ago with a dominant win at Albury. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn much kinder this time. Progressive type that can win again. HIP HIP OLE (6) will need some luck from the car park draw but is worth keeping safe in exotics.
